data.name: cbquality.ToolTip
data.value: Define the Quality of the resulting Recolour

data.name: lvbase.ToolTip
data.value: Select the Base Picture you want to use

data.name: cbflip.ToolTip
data.value: Check this, if you want SimPe to Flip the Source Image. With this Option checked your Picture won’t appear mirrored in the game on most basegame pictures.

data.name: btchooseCol.ToolTip
data.value: Click to Choose Background Colour Darker colours work best
